description_long: This object is a colorful set of ceramic cups and matching saucers arranged on a circular metal rack. The set includes four cups, each in a different pastel color—pink, yellow, blue, and brown—hanging by their handles from hooks on the upper part of the rack. Below the cups, four saucers are stacked neatly, each matching the color of a cup. The rack is made of thin, shiny metal rods, forming a stable base and a rounded frame for hanging the cups. One cup and saucer, in orange, are placed separately in front of the rack, highlighting the set's use and design. The surfaces of the cups and saucers are smooth and glossy, with no visible patterns or branding.
description: A vibrant set of four pastel ceramic cups with matching saucers, displayed on a circular metal rack, with one orange cup and saucer set apart in front. The cups and saucers are smooth, glossy, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rack with four hanging cups and stacked saucers, with an orange cup and saucer placed in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange cup and saucer separated from the rack, and the arrangement of cups and saucers on the rack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the hanging cups and the stacked saucers beneath them, with all cups visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open faces of the cups on the rack and the orange cup and saucer to the right.
